properties.description: Create a pipeline that will create the incremental pipeline using the table instead of HighWaterMark File.

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT HW_DATE AS 'datefromHW' FROM  [dbo].[Highwatermark] where HW_Tablename = 'Customer'
select max(modifieddate) as lastmodifiedon from saleslt.customer

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select * from saleslt.customer
where modifieddate > '@{activity('Lookup Highwatermark date').output.firstRow.datefromHW}' and modifieddate <= '@{activity('Lookup Customer last modifiedon date').output.firstRow.lastmodifiedon}'

activities.name: Updating the High Watermark table
activities.description: Updating the High Watermark table to the max modified on date in the customer table

text.value:
UPDATE dbo.Highwatermark
SET HW_DATE = '@{activity('Lookup Customer last modifiedon date').output.firstRow.lastmodifiedon}'

activities.name: Copy Customer Data from DB to ADLS
Copy Customer and their address to ADLS

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT a.CustomerID, a.FirstName, a.LastName, b.AddressID, c.Addressline1, c.Addressline2, c.city,c.StateProvince, c.CountryRegion FROM [SalesLT].[Customer] a
inner join [SalesLT].[CustomerAddress] b
ON a.CustomerID = b.CustomerID
inner join [SalesLT].[Address] c
ON b.AddressID = c.AddressID
